text: Last class I recapped the decisions and assigned the tasks.
Today I want to make a call and take a clear message.

Can I take a message? She is not available.
Would you like to leave a message?
Could you tell her that Percival called?
Could I speak to Karen, please?
Hello, this is Percival. Could I speak to Karen, please?
I am sorry, she is not available right now. Can I take a message?
Yes, please. Could you tell her that Percival called about the supplier report?
Of course. Would you like her to call back, or do you prefer to send a message?
A call back is fine. I am available after three. My connection was bad earlier, so the phone is best.
Got it. I will give her the message, and she will call you back this afternoon. Thank you.
She is not available. Can I take a message?
I could not reach her, so I left a voicemail.
Could you call back this afternoon? Thank you.

Good morning, EGEA Saneamento, this is Daniel speaking. I am sorry, but Karen is not available right now. She is in a meeting until eleven. Would you like to leave a message, or would you like to call back later? If it is urgent, I can reach her by text. Let me take your name and number, and I will tell her you called. She usually checks her voicemail at lunch, so she will call you back this afternoon. Thank you for calling, and have a good day.

Hi Percival, this is Karen. I am sorry I missed your call. I was on another line and the connection was bad, so I had to hang up. I got your message from Daniel. You wanted to talk about the supplier report. I am available after three o'clock today. Could you call me back then, or send me a quick text? If you cannot reach me, please leave a voicemail and I will return your call first thing tomorrow. Thank you, and talk soon.

First, Percival calls the office and asks to speak to Karen. Then, Daniel says Karen is not available right now. After that, Daniel offers to take a message. Later, Percival leaves a clear message with his name and number. Finally, Daniel says he will tell Karen, and she will call back this afternoon.
